economic_notes: GBEs include Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (property rental/management), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry LP (forestry operations), Centre Creek LP (property acquisition/management in Chilliwack River Valley), Seven Generations Environmental Services Ltd (environmental monitoring), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP (forestry/heritage protection). First Nation has property taxation regime under First Nations Fiscal Management Act. Settlement trust funds from 2015 land claim settlement with Federal Government for lands in Chilliwack.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023). Eight GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Tzeachten First Nation revenue of $782,418 is unusual and unexplained — may be a one-time transfer. CMHC subsidy ($44,206) and ISC ($342,765) are the main government transfers; total_government_transfers includes ISC + Ottawa Trust + CMHC + Sto:lo Service Agency Society. Current liabilities not separately disclosed in extracted text. Deferred revenue ending balance not separately stated. No employee count or population figures disclosed. Prior year cash flow shows proceeds from long term debt of $109,776.
